query:
-- Assign last 3 photos to flight 180003
UPDATE media SET flightId = 180003 WHERE id IN (10009, 10010, 10011) AND projectId = 1;

-- Verify all assignments
SELECT 
  f.id as flight_id,
  f.name as flight_name,
  COUNT(m.id) as media_count
FROM flights f
LEFT JOIN media m ON f.id = m.flightId
WHERE f.projectId = 1
GROUP BY f.id, f.name
ORDER BY f.id;
